code number associated with this description. There are up to four additional taxonomy groupings for 
the prescriber in the Prescriber Characteristics file (reference OTHER_TAXONOMY_CLASS01 through 
OTHER_TAXONOMY_CLASS04), which can be identified using this description variable. 

Taxonomy codes are assigned by the National Uniform Claim Committee (NUCC). For a current list of
